name: codex-ralph-loop
description: Project-local Codex loop for PRD-driven implementation, checks, and review gates.

interface.shortDescription: PRD-driven build loops with local checks and a read-only review gate
interface.longDescription: Use Codex Ralph Loop to keep work grounded in a project-local PRD, task files, steering notes, checks, and a dedicated review pass instead of a blind retry loop.
defaultPrompt: Run the Codex Ralph loop for my PRD and task files
Review my loop runtime and improve the evaluator gates
Turn a planning doc into a task-driven Codex build loop
